summary: rc.24 Cite Contract Policy — upgrade `[recalled]` cite semantics from id-existence verification to action-commitment verification. AI replies citing decisions/pitfalls类 KB must append operator-based contract (`→ edit:<glob> / !edit / require / forbid / skip:<reason>`); `fab doctor --cite-coverage` compares contract operators against session edit diff to detect violations. Scope: Y-only structured syntax (no free-text fallback), L3+L1 enforcement (no PreToolUse blocking), schema bump with `cite_commitments` parallel array, new `cite_contract_policy_activated` marker with bootstrap-drift gate, type-aware routing via knowledge-meta idTypeMap, personal-layer parity (--layer filter + violation breakdown).
approach: 12-task linear chain across 4 waves. Wave 1 (schema + bootstrap basics): event-ledger schema升级 + BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL 文本更新. Wave 2 (hook 三端 parser): 抽 shared cite-line parser lib + cc/codex/cursor 模板接入 + Stop hook 软提醒. Wave 3 (doctor 服务侧): ensureCiteContractPolicyActivatedMarker + idTypeMap loader + runDoctorCiteCoverage 扩展(contract metric + layer routing + unresolved 桶) + CiteCoverageReport 类型 + i18n. Wave 4 (CLI + 收尾): doctor CLI --layer flag + 渲染 + CLI surface snapshot 修复 + CHANGELOG + migration note. 沿用 rc.20 single-theme pattern,per-task commit。

waves.label: Schema + bootstrap 基础
waves.rationale: schema + canonical text 是后续 hook parser/doctor 解析的契约源,必须先落

waves.label: Hook 三端 parser
waves.rationale: 依赖 Wave 1 schema;parser 抽 shared lib 后三端接入,降低 drift 风险

waves.label: Doctor 服务侧
waves.rationale: 依赖 Wave 1 schema + 独立于 Wave 2(doctor 读结构化字段,不直接调 parser)

waves.label: CLI + 收尾
waves.rationale: 依赖 Wave 3 CiteCoverageReport 类型;CLI 渲染 + snapshot 修复 + 文档

design_decisions.decision: Y-only contract syntax with skip:<reason> opt-out (no free-text fallback)
design_decisions.rationale: Free-text fallback degrades into theater within 6 months (lazy default wins). skip:<reason> is more honest — explicitly tags rules that can't be operator-ized, and skip ratio becomes data-driven signal for operator vocabulary expansion. Grill-me locked B1.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Initial 5 operators cover ~11/16 D1 KB entries in werewolf sample; remaining 5/16 use skip:. If skip > 30% sustained, expand vocabulary in rc.25+.

design_decisions.decision: L3+L1 enforcement (BOOTSTRAP text + Stop hook soft reminder + doctor audit), NOT PreToolUse blocking
design_decisions.rationale: Preserves rc.20 '不阻断你工作' 总则. PreToolUse blocking has poor cross-client UX (cc/codex/cursor 阻断语义不一致) and violates the soft-policy contract. Soft reminder via existing Stop hook gives feedback loop without disruption. Grill-me locked B2.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Violation rate depends on model instruction-following quality (GPT-5/Sonnet pass, smaller models may not). Acceptable — Fabric targets capable models.

design_decisions.decision: Schema bump with cite_commitments parallel array (β path), NOT raw-parse-at-audit (α) or hybrid (γ)
design_decisions.rationale: Mirrors rc.20 cite_tags schema-evolution pattern (parallel array + .default([])). Upstream validation, fast audit (no per-event regex), backward-compat free via default. Grill-me locked B3.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Hook parser must transform raw cite line → structured cite_commitments at write time; shared lib mitigates per-client drift.

design_decisions.decision: New cite_contract_policy_activated marker (independent window), NOT reuse cite_policy_activated
design_decisions.rationale: Avoids polluting rc.20 marker semantics (which anchors existing recalled_unverified / qualifying_cites metrics). Contract metrics get their own window starting from rc.24-activated. Old rc.20-rc.23 events default to cite_commitments=[] but are excluded from contract checks via marker gate. Grill-me locked B4.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Two markers in ledger; users see two emission events on first rc.24 doctor run. Acceptable per rc.20 precedent.

design_decisions.decision: Marker emit blocked by bootstrap drift detection (B5-α), NOT install-side emit (β) or accept-noise (γ)
design_decisions.rationale: Bridges the half-upgrade window (rc.24 server live + rc.23 hooks still installed) by refusing to activate contract policy until `fab install` reruns. Zero false-violation risk during transition. Reuses existing drift-detection plumbing.
design_decisions.tradeoff: User must run `fab uninstall && fab install` post-upgrade to activate contract policy; documented in CHANGELOG migration section.

design_decisions.decision: Type routing via knowledge-meta idTypeMap with cite_id_unresolved bucket
design_decisions.rationale: decisions/pitfalls 强制 contract / models reference-cite / guidelines+processes 推 rc.25 LLM-judge. Hallucinated id (cite_id not in idTypeMap) goes to dedicated unresolved bucket — not falsely classified as contract_missing. Grill-me locked B6.
design_decisions.tradeoff: doctor must load idTypeMap per audit run; <10ms for typical corpus (<200 entries).

design_decisions.decision: Personal-layer parity via --layer filter + violation breakdown, but layer-blind contract check logic
design_decisions.rationale: Personal KB currently empty in user setup, but architectural parity matters for future. Layer surfaces in reporting (team violations [team — review], personal violations [personal — fyi]) without duplicating check logic. User-level cite-policy override (~/.fabric/AGENTS.md) deferred to rc.25+ (YAGNI until personal corpus populated).
design_decisions.tradeoff: Filter is symmetric to existing --client filter; minimal cognitive load addition.

design_decisions.decision: Shared cite-line parser lib (packages/shared) consumed by 3 client hooks, NOT duplicated per-client
design_decisions.rationale: Three hook templates (cc/codex/cursor) parsing same cite line independently is the highest drift risk in rc.24 scope. Extracting parser to shared lib means one canonical parsing implementation; templates only invoke + serialize.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Hook templates gain dependency on shared package contents (node_modules unavailable at hook runtime → must inline serialize). Mitigation: ship parser as zero-dep pure-function module, inline-bundle at install time.

design_decisions.decision: Per-task commit style (12 commits, one per TASK)
design_decisions.rationale: rc.20 precedent (11 commits) + user preference; each TASK = atomic, reviewable, revertable. Hook parser bug → bisect granularity is per-TASK.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Slightly higher orchestration overhead vs single mega-commit; well worth it for review surface.

data_flow.diagram: AI emits `KB: <id> (anchor) [recalled] → edit:foo.ts !edit:bar.ts` first line → Stop hook reads transcript → shared parser splits cite_ids + cite_tags + cite_commitments → assistant_turn_observed event written to .fabric/events.jsonl with structured commitments field → `fab doctor --cite-coverage` reads events via readEventLedger → drift-gated marker emit → idTypeMap loaded from knowledge-meta-builder → per-cite type routing (decisions/pitfalls strict / models skip / guidelines+processes defer) → contract operator vs session edit_intent_checked diff comparison → contract_violated / contract_missing / hard_violated metrics + skip_reason histogram + cite_id_unresolved bucket → bilingual report rendered via i18n with --layer filter cross-tab

stages.output: assistant_turn_observed event with cite_commitments[] structured field
cite_contract_policy_activated event (only if no bootstrap drift)
CiteCoverageReport with contract_metrics + skip_count histogram + cite_id_unresolved + layer breakdown

user_facing_steps: 2. cd <project> && fab uninstall && fab install  (syncs BOOTSTRAP + hooks to all 3 clients)
3. fab doctor --cite-coverage  (first run emits cite_contract_policy_activated marker if drift-free)
blocked_states: If bootstrap drift detected → report shows 'contract_check: skipped (bootstrap drift — run fab install)' until step 2 completes
Until step 3 runs → contract metrics show 'awaiting marker emit'

pressure_pass.notes: runDoctorCiteCoverage 扩展同时引入 contract metric + layer routing + unresolved 桶 + idTypeMap loader 联动,是单点最重 task。read_first 包含 doctor.ts:5455-5990 + knowledge-meta-builder.ts:337-360 + event-ledger schema 新字段定义,convergence criteria 全部 grep-verifiable。

confidence.rationale: All 7 grill-me branches locked + 4 personal-layer gaps addressed + 5/16 D1 KB coverage estimate validated against werewolf sample. Single risk point: shared cite-line parser lib bundling for hook runtime (node_modules unavailable) — TASK-03 explicitly handles inline-serialization. Estimate accuracy slightly lower due to first-time parser-lib extraction (no prior precedent in repo).
